THE HON. FRANK BLAS, JR., Speaker
IMina'trentai OchoNa Liheslaturan Guåhan
38th Guam Legislature
Guam Congress Building
163 Chalan Santo Papa
Hagåtfia, Guam96910
Re: Bill No. 50-38 (COR), "AN ACT TO ADD A NEW 4108.1 TO CHAPTER 8,
TITLE 4, GUAM CODE ANNOTATED, RELATIVE TO TEMPORARY
EMPLOYMENT OF GOVERNMENT OF GUAM RETIRED EMPLOYEES."
I-IåfaAdai Mr. Speaker,
Bill No. 50-38 (COR) ensures that retirees reemployed by the government ofGuam will accrue
sick leave benefits in the same manner as active employees. This measure recognizes the
invaluable contributions ofour retirees while maintaining consistency in the application ofsick
leave laws and regulations, withthe exception oflump sum payouts for sick leave.
By extending the accrual of sick leave to retirees who are reemployed in the government of
Guam, we enhance workforce participation and support those who continue to serve our
community. For these reasons, I sign Bill No. 50-38 (COR) into law as PublicLawNo. 38-17.
Senseramente,
LOURDESA. LEON GUERRERO
IMaga'hågan Guåhan
Governorof Guam

AN ACT TOADD A NEW 4108.1 TO CHAPTER 4, TITLE
4, GUAM CODE ANNOTATED, RELATIVE TO
TEMPORARY EMPLOYMENT OF GOVERNMENT OF
GUAM RETIRED EMPLOYEES.
1 BE IT ENACTED BY THE PEOPLE OF GUAM:
2 Section 1. A new 4108.1 is added to Chapter 4, Title 4, Guam Code
3 Annotated, to read as follows:
4 "S 4108.1 Accrual of Sick Leave for Retirees Re-employed with
5 the Government of Guam.
1
Doc. No. 38GL-25-0741.*

1 Retirees that are authorized to continue receiving their annuity
2 payments while being reemployed in the government of Guam shall accrue
3 sickleave benefits in the samemanneras active employees ofthe Government
4 of Guam. All laws, rules and regulations, with the exception of lumpsum
5 payouts of sick leave, regarding the accrual, use and disposition of sick leave
6 shall applyto retiredemployees who are rehired in the Government ofGuam."
2
Doc. No. 38GL-25-0741.*
